ref: Jesus went all over Galilee, teaching in their synagogues and preaching the good news about God's kingdom. He also healed every kind of disease and sickness.

text: “Fʋ nɩmbʋa dɩ keŋ tʋŋ fʋ bɩaŋ, ga ʋ jigiŋ saŋŋa dieke ʋ benne ʋ nyɩɩna ma a balɩ wa wudieke ʋ yine. Dɩɩ yi ʋ saagɩ ʋ tʋnna die, nɩ bɩ yiwo nɩmballɩ bɩbra die.
translated: “My mother gave birth to me and I grew up, she searched for someone to marry but couldn’t find, then she decided to look for a wife for me. When I was about to get married, my mother said it was better for her to get married first.”

ref: She had gone to many doctors, and they had not done anything except cause her a lot of pain. She had paid them all the money she had. But instead of getting better, she only got worse.

translated: The dog chases the person who beats the drum to dance. The dog does not know that the beating of the drum makes the person happy, it only knows that the person is dancing.

translated: What do you want to eat that you are shouting; are you hungry or what? You are shouting like a hungry person; or are you crying because your mother beat you or what?
